name: Fangs of the Apocalypse|RPG|
description:
This is a text-based RPG where you survive in a world that has fallen victim to the NecroX-9 virus. You choose your own path.:

  • Become a hero by teaming up with the colonies.

  • Turn into a predator by robbing the weak.

  • Fight alone, relying only on yourself.

What does the bot do?

▪ Gives you a choice — every step you take affects the story.

▪ Challenging — Mutants, raiders, hunger, and the mysteries of the virus await you.

At night, you hear howling outside the shelter walls... Is it just the wind? Or is a Shrieker leading a horde? Investigate or trust to luck?

You don't play, you survive.

──────⊰☠༒☠⊱──────

P.S. it was tested on DeepSeek. English is not my native language.

──────⊰☠༒☠⊱──────

A brief digression:

Types of mutant zombies: Titanium (Brute), Screamer (Shrieker), Bloodhound (Tracker), Pale (Pale Crawler), Bubble (Bloat).

Colonies: Loners of the Wasteland, Trading League, Bloody Temple, Bonecrusers, Grey Brothers, New Dawn.

Cults and insane sects: Church of the Last Light, Blood Whisperers.

Secret organizations Phoenix Project, Grey Couriers.

For more information, ask the bot.
creator: Kiper
